c.d: The ability of the app to provide accurate, up-to-date price comparisons across multiple retailers or stores.
Number and quality of available coupons, discount codes, and deals provided by the app for various product categories.
Supported devices/platforms such as Android, iOS, and web which affects accessibility for users.
Average user ratings on app stores reflecting user satisfaction and app reliability.
Capability to find deals both for local brick-and-mortar stores and online shopping platforms.
Extra functionalities such as barcode scanning, price alerts, user manual downloads, or in-app messaging.
